questions.description: The auto-tagging pipeline has scattered non-persistent status indicators. The Assistant chat panel has its own sending/error state. Or unified status for the whole app.

options.label: Auto-tagging pipeline only
Assistant chat panel only
Both — unified status
All app operations (scan, save, audit, lyrics too)

notes: Primary: Assistant panel — enrich visibility when using Assistant
Secondary: bottom status bar for all operations (Auto-Tag, Audit, Get Lyrics, etc.)

questions.prompt: Where should the status live in the UI?
questions.description: The title bar is already crowded with buttons. A bottom status bar is common in Electron apps. Or a dedicated status icon area in the title bar.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Persistent bottom status bar + enhanced status inside Assistant panel

options.label: Bottom status bar (like VS Code)
Icon/badge in title bar
Badge in the sidebar
Floating toast/notification (non-blocking)

questions.customAnswer: Bottom status bar for all operations, plus enhanced status visualization inside the Assistant panel itself (beyond the inline chat messages)

questions.prompt: How should failures be shown and dismissed?
questions.description: Currently errors auto-dismiss after 5 seconds in the title bar. Users may miss them.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Persistent failure indicator with message, manually dismissable, plus auto-dismiss for transient warnings

options.label: Persist failure until user dismisses
Keep a history/log of recent failures
Auto-dismiss when next operation succeeds
Per-album failure tracking in batch mode

notes: In the status bar: failures persist until dismissed, auto-clear on next successful operation start
In the Assistant panel: keep the error messages inline as they are, but add a persistent error indicator

questions.prompt: How detailed should status messages be?
questions.recommendedAnswer: Current step + failure reason + which album/file

options.label: Current step name + failure reason + target
Full pipeline trace (which lookup failed, API status codes)
Just 'Working…' / 'Failed'

questions.prompt: What's in scope vs out of scope for this goal?
questions.recommendedAnswer: In scope: add a status bar, wire auto-tag states to it, show persistent failures.

options.label: In scope: bottom status bar component + wiring to existing states
In scope: persistent failure display (no more 5s auto-dismiss)
Out of scope: new backend event streams (use existing)
In scope: also wire audit and scan progress to same bar
Out of scope: redesigning title bar layout

questions.customAnswer: In scope: enhanced Assistant panel status visualization beyond inline chat messages (dedicated status area/indicator showing 'thinking', 'looking up', 'applying changes', 'failed')
notes: Primary focus: enriching Assistant panel status indicators
Secondary: bottom status bar for button-driven operations
Use existing event streams — no new backend events
